steps.title: Read two points from the graph
steps.content: The line passes through the intercepts $(0,9)$ and $(14,0)$. The point $(7,c)$ is halfway between those $x$-values because $7$ is halfway between $0$ and $14$.

steps.title: Use the halfway value
steps.content:
On a line, the halfway $x$-value has the halfway $y$-value:
$$c=\frac{9+0}{2}=\frac{9}{2}=4.5$$
So the value of $c$ is 4.5.
